verdicts.expected: ACHARE02 should match the compact squared S-101/OpenCPN anchorage anchor: vertical shank, crossbar, angular flukes, magenta, no top ring.
verdicts.judge_comments: Repair fixed the black color problem, but the shape is still a generic recreational anchor rather than the S-52/S-101 chart anchor.
verdicts.observed: Magenta generic anchor with top ring, rounded flukes, and broad OpenBridge-style stroke.
verdicts.required_change: Remove top ring, square/straighten flukes, and redraw the compact S-101/OpenCPN ACHARE02 geometry.
source_refs_used: opencpn:anchorage area as a point at small scale, or anchor points of mooring trot at large scale:opencpn_s52_reference_render:out/opencpn_s52_reference/ACHARE02__day.png

verdicts.expected: ACHARE51 is the larger pale/magenta boundary anchorage-area anchor with squared crossbar/shank and angular flukes as shown in S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate collapses ACHARE51 into the same generic point-anchor silhouette and misses the distinct boundary-anchor geometry.
verdicts.observed: Same generic magenta anchor as ACHARE02 with heavier stroke and top ring.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw row-specific ACHARE51 from S-101/OpenCPN, using the larger squared anchor outline and no top ring.

verdicts.expected: Designated anchor berth requires the compact anchor with a central berth ring on the shank, not an enclosing outer circle.
verdicts.judge_comments: The berth-circle cue is in the wrong place; this changes the chart-standard visual meaning.
verdicts.observed: Magenta generic anchor with a large outer circle around the whole symbol.
verdicts.required_change: Move the berth ring to the center of the anchor shank and match the compact S-101/OpenCPN ACHBRT07 shape.
source_refs_used: opencpn:designated anchor berth for a single vessel:opencpn_s52_reference_render:out/opencpn_s52_reference/ACHBRT07__day.png

verdicts.expected: Anchor point should be the small OpenCPN/S-52 anchor glyph: compact magenta/purple, angular flukes, no recreational top ring.
verdicts.judge_comments: Recognizable as an anchor, but still not the known chart-symbol silhouette.
verdicts.observed: Magenta generic anchor with top ring and rounded flukes.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the exact compact OpenCPN ACHPNT01 anchor glyph in Helm stroke/color style.

verdicts.expected: ACHRES61 should use the S-101/OpenCPN restricted-anchoring anchor geometry, diagonal caution slash, and small caution marker placement.
verdicts.judge_comments: The slash and caution cue are present, but the base anchor remains wrong and the marker is too large/loose.
verdicts.observed: Generic magenta anchor with top ring, prohibition slash, and exclamation mark.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw from ACHRES61 reference: squared anchor, diagonal slash, and reference-matched caution mark placement/scale.
source_refs_used: opencpn:area where anchoring is prohibited or restricted, with other cautions:opencpn_s52_reference_render:out/opencpn_s52_reference/ACHRES61__day.png

verdicts.expected: ACHRES71 should use the S-101/OpenCPN restricted-anchoring anchor geometry, slash, and small information marker placement.
verdicts.judge_comments: The information cue exists, but the anchor silhouette and marker scale are not close enough to the chart references.
verdicts.observed: Generic magenta anchor with top ring, diagonal slash, and a large lowercase i.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw from ACHRES71 reference: squared anchor, slash, and compact info marker in the reference position.
source_refs_used: opencpn:area where anchoring is prohibited or restricted, with other information:opencpn_s52_reference_render:out/opencpn_s52_reference/ACHRES71__day.png

verdicts.expected: Additional mark triangle to the right: right-pointing white/outlined triangle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN reference semantics and orientation; stroke/scale can be tuned later.
verdicts.observed: White right-pointing triangular board with black outline.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass may reduce stroke/scale.

verdicts.expected: Additional mark triangle to the left: left-pointing white/outlined triangle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN reference semantics and orientation; stroke/scale can be tuned later.
verdicts.observed: White left-pointing triangular board with black outline.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass may reduce stroke/scale.

verdicts.expected: Additional mark board, bottom: small horizontal pale board/rectangle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Shape and orientation match the OpenCPN reference. The Helm blue is stronger than the tiny pale reference but not semantically unsafe.
verdicts.observed: Horizontal blue rectangular board with black outline.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional palette pass can lighten this board if desired.

verdicts.expected: Airport area pattern: aircraft silhouette inside land/brown circle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantically matches the S-101/OpenCPN airport area reference. The aircraft outline is stylized but remains recognizable and close enough.
verdicts.observed: Brown/gold aircraft inside a circle.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass can square the aircraft silhouette closer to S-101.
source_refs_used: opencpn:pattern of symbols for an airport area:opencpn_s52_reference_render:out/opencpn_s52_reference/AIRARE02__day.png

verdicts.expected: AIS target with heading/course unknown: green AIS target plus unknown/question cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN reference semantics: target triangle and question mark are both present.
verdicts.observed: Green AIS triangular target with magenta question mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale pass may tighten native glyph proportions.
source_refs_used: opencpn:AIS target whose heading and course are both unknown:opencpn_s52_reference_render:out/opencpn_s52_reference/AISDEF01__day.png

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AIS one-minute vector mark renders as a small green chevron/angled vector mark, not a plain horizontal ARPA-style tick.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate confuses AIS vector-minute mark with ARPA tick styling.
verdicts.observed: Single green horizontal tick.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw AISONE01 from the OpenCPN reference as the small angled/chevron AIS vector mark.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AIS six-minute vector mark should follow the AIS angled/chevron vector-marker family, not double ARPA-style bars.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate uses the wrong visual vocabulary and does not match the tiny AIS reference.
verdicts.observed: Two green horizontal ticks.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw AISSIX01 from OpenCPN as the six-minute AIS mark, preserving the angled AIS marker form.

verdicts.expected: Sleeping AIS target: simple green AIS target triangle without active vector/heading cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantically matches the OpenCPN sleeping AIS target.
verdicts.observed: Green hollow AIS triangular target without vector/heading extension.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional native-scale tuning only.

verdicts.expected: Active AIS target showing vector and/or heading: green target triangle with heading/vector cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantically matches the OpenCPN active AIS target.
verdicts.observed: Green AIS target triangle with short heading/vector extension.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional native-scale tuning only.

verdicts.expected: ARPA target: green circular target/ring with center mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN ARPA target reference.
verdicts.observed: Green ring target with central dot.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional stroke/scale polish only.

verdicts.expected: One-minute ARPA vector mark: small horizontal green tick.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN ARPA one-minute mark semantics.
verdicts.observed: Single green horizontal tick.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional native-scale tuning only.

verdicts.expected: Available OpenCPN ARPSIX01 reference presents as a compact horizontal ARPA tick at native size; the repaired double-bar is not source-matched.
verdicts.judge_comments: The six-minute distinction was inferred rather than copied from the available reference. Needs exact source review before approval.
verdicts.observed: Two green horizontal ticks.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw ARPSIX01 from a verified OpenCPN/S-52 source crop; do not use the AIS/AISSIX or guessed double-bar form.

verdicts.expected: North cardinal topmark: both cones point up.
verdicts.judge_comments: Cone orientation matches S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN. Large stroke/scale is a style issue, not a semantic failure.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles/cones both pointing up.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke pass only.

verdicts.expected: East cardinal topmark: cones point away from each other, up and down.
verdicts.judge_comments: Cone orientation matches S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN. Large stroke/scale is a style issue, not a semantic failure.
verdicts.observed: Upper yellow triangle points up; lower triangle points down.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke pass only.

verdicts.expected: South cardinal topmark: both cones point down.
verdicts.judge_comments: Cone orientation matches S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN. Large stroke/scale is a style issue, not a semantic failure.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles/cones both pointing down.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke pass only.

verdicts.expected: West cardinal topmark: cones point toward each other.
verdicts.judge_comments: Cone orientation matches S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN. Large stroke/scale is a style issue, not a semantic failure.
verdicts.observed: Upper yellow triangle points down; lower triangle points up.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke pass only.

verdicts.expected: BCNCON81 requires a verified exact OpenCPN/S-52 reference; this queue row lacks an inspectable current reference image and the name alone is insufficient.
verdicts.judge_comments: Do not approve a generic post for an unclear beacon condition symbol without a source crop.
verdicts.observed: Black generic vertical beacon/post.
verdicts.required_change: Regenerate/locate the exact BCNCON81 reference crop, then redraw from it; keep this in hard repair until verified.

verdicts.expected: Default simplified beacon: compact gray/black beacon marker with magenta unknown/question cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the S-101/OpenCPN default-beacon semantics. Geometry can be tightened, but the required unknown-beacon cue is present.
verdicts.observed: Gray/black beacon post with magenta question mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional geometry pass can match S-101 more tightly.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN general full-chart beacon includes the compact post with base/circle/crossbar details, not only a filled rectangular post.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate is readable as a generic beacon, but it drops the small chart-standard base/circle detail in the S-101 reference.
verdicts.observed: Plain black vertical beacon/post with stem.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BCNGEN01 with the S-101/OpenCPN compact post, base circle, and side/base marks.

verdicts.expected: Paper-chart default beacon should be the compact black paper-chart beacon form with circle/crossbar plus magenta question mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate has the question mark, but reuses the generic vertical post instead of the paper-chart beacon geometry.
verdicts.observed: Black generic beacon post with magenta question mark.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BCNGEN03 from S-101/OpenCPN with paper-chart beacon circle/crossbar geometry and question cue.

verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke pass only.
